text: Crowded field of candidates compete to replace MTG in Georgia special election - NPR

text: Live updates: About 140 US service members have been injured since start of Iran war, Pentagon says - CNN

text: Trump 'not happy' with Iran's choice of Mojtaba Khamenei as new supreme leader - Fox News
fullText: President Donald Trump told Fox News he doesn’t believe that Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and Iran’s next supreme leader, “can live in peace.”

text: TSA absences double during shutdown, 300 officers quit, as some airports see longer security lines - CBS News

text: Whistleblower claims ex-DOGE member says he took Social Security data to new job - The Washington Post
